prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the assumption that HD's daily log returns follow a normal distribution, calculated from historical data over the past 2 years (approximately 503 trading days). The mean daily log return (mu_r = 0.000181) and standard deviation of daily log returns (sigma_r = 0.013446) were used to model the price movement over 18 days. The point estimate (375.71) is the median of the predicted log-normal price distribution, which incorporates the historical drift. Confidence intervals are derived from the quantiles of this log-normal distribution, reflecting the range within which the price is expected to fall with the given probability.
